result.stdout:
Description:
  Gauge.NET - tool-call validation

Usage:
  Gauge.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  validate <traces>  Validate trace(s) against tool contracts and policy
  baseline           Baseline operations
  report             Reporting commands

result.stdout:
Description:
  Baseline operations

Usage:
  Gauge.Cli baseline [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  create <trace>              Create a baseline snapshot from a run
  compare <baseline> <trace>  Compare a run against a baseline snapshot
  suite                       Suite baseline operations

commands.payload:
Description:
  Baseline operations

Usage:
  Gauge.Cli baseline [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  create <trace>              Create a baseline snapshot from a run
  compare <baseline> <trace>  Compare a run against a baseline snapshot
  suite                       Suite baseline operations

result.stdout:
Description:
  Compare a run against a baseline snapshot

Usage:
  Gauge.Cli baseline compare <baseline> <trace> [options]

Arguments:
  <baseline>  Path to baseline snapshot JSON.
  <trace>     Path to a trace JSON file. Can be ToolCall[] or AgentRunTrace.

Options:
  --contracts <contracts> (REQUIRED)  Path to contracts JSON file (ToolContract[]).
  --policy <policy>                   Optional policy JSON file (ToolValidationPolicy).
  -?, -h, --help                      Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Suite baseline operations

Usage:
  Gauge.Cli baseline suite [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  create <traces>              Create a suite baseline snapshot from multiple traces
  compare <baseline> <traces>  Compare a run suite against a suite baseline snapshot

commands.payload:
Description:
  Suite baseline operations

Usage:
  Gauge.Cli baseline suite [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  create <traces>              Create a suite baseline snapshot from multiple traces
  compare <baseline> <traces>  Compare a run suite against a suite baseline snapshot

result.stdout:
Description:
  Compare a run suite against a suite baseline snapshot

Usage:
  Gauge.Cli baseline suite compare <baseline> [<traces>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <baseline>  Path to suite baseline snapshot JSON (BaselineSuiteSnapshot).
  <traces>    Trace JSON files. Can be ToolCall[] or AgentRunTrace.

Options:
  --contracts <contracts> (REQUIRED)  Path to contracts JSON file (ToolContract[]).
  --policy <policy>                   Optional policy JSON file (ToolValidationPolicy).
  --path <path>                       Directory containing trace JSON files.
  --glob <glob>                       Glob pattern (supports **, *, ?) used under --path. Default: **/*.json [default: **/*.json]
  --fail-fast                         Stop on first failure (validation failure or read error).
  --max-failures <max-failures>       Stop after N failures (validation failure or read error).
  --report <report>                   Optional report output for the current run: none (default), junit, json. [default: none]
  --out <out>                         Output file path for --report junit|json.
  --delta-out <delta-out>             Optional output JSON file containing regression deltas.
  -?, -h, --help                      Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:

  --out <out>                         Output file path for --report junit|json.

  -?, -h, --help                      Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Reporting commands

Usage:
  Gauge.Cli report [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  junit <traces>  Generate a JUnit XML report from validation run(s)
  json <traces>   Generate a JSON report from validation run(s)

result.stdout:
Description:
  Validate trace(s) against tool contracts and policy

Usage:
  Gauge.Cli validate [<traces>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <traces>  Trace JSON files. Can be ToolCall[] or AgentRunTrace.

Options:
  --contracts <contracts> (REQUIRED)  Path to contracts JSON file (ToolContract[]).
  --policy <policy>                   Optional policy JSON file (ToolValidationPolicy).
  --path <path>                       Directory containing trace JSON files.
  --glob <glob>                       Glob pattern (supports **, *, ?) used under --path. Default: **/*.json [default: **/*.json]
  --fail-fast                         Stop on first failure (validation failure or read error).
  --max-failures <max-failures>       Stop after N failures (validation failure or read error).
  --format <format>                   Output format for validate: console (default), junit, json. [default: console]
  -?, -h, --help                      Show help and usage information
